HEARING PLTFS MO TO ENTER JUDGMENT & DEFTS MO TO STAY JUDGMT PLTFS MO GRNTD & JUDGMENT SIGNED. DEFTS MO TO STAY JUDGMENT GRANTED. DEFTS TO PAY RENT PUR 1176 CCP ON OR BEFORE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL APPEAL RULING. JUDGE: DOUGLAS C MUNSON REPORTER: MARY HINDS CLERK:DAVID SWANSON DEPT. 303

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINER, CHRISTOPHER WINER, ALEXANDER SITES, ROBERT CARBALADA-SITES, INMACULADA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3305-3307 MISSION ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110 $6,600.38 RENT, $2,533.35 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,133.73, LEASE FORFEITED, PURSUANT TO HEARING OF 9/8, REQUEST FOR STAY WAS GRANTED UNTIL THE DECISION OF APPEAL. DAMAGES JOINTLY & SEVERALLY AGAINST ALL DEFENDANTS IN THE SUM OF $6,600.38. COST ACCORDING TO MEMO OF COSTS TO BE FILED AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

HERG PLTS MO TO SETTLE JUDGMT & DEFTS MO FOR STAY PENDING APPEAL. PLTFS MO FOR JUDGMT GRNTD. JUDGMT SIGNED IN OPEN CT DEFTS MO TO STAY JUDGMT GRNTD. DEFTS COUNSEL TO SUBMIT OR TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE. DEFTS TO PAY RENT PUR 1176 CCP WHILE APPEAL IS PENDING. JUDGE: DOUGLAS C. MUNSON, REPORTER: MARY HINDS, CLERK: DAVID SWANSON

ORDER STAYING EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT - JUDGE DOUGLAS MUNSON. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT IS STAYED PENDING APPEAL PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1176. AS A CONDITION OF ISSUING THE STAY OF ENFORCEMENT, DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO PAY THE CONTRACT RENTS INTO THE COURT ON OR BEFORE THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH.

Motion To Lift Stay Of Execution Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ADD-ON (per ex-parte application however no order signed).
APPEAR: Andrew M. Zacks, Esq. 956-8100 for pltf & moving party; Raquel Fox, Esq. 771-9850 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: The Court ruled as follows: Defts to remain in premises until 01/07/03, however defts to voluntarily move out by that date. If not, parties stipulated to liquidated damages penalty in the amount of $5,000.00. Writ of execution may be in place but not enforceable until 01/08 if defts fail to vacate. Mr. Zacks to prepare order. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
